source: VTA OCT 2025 RBS, LGHS-zone filter (data/processed/route27_lg_stops.csv via src.vta_rbs)
notes: LG-only Route 27 annual boardings (typical day x 255/52/52). Anchored to VTA OCT 2025 RBS when available.
Predicted LG-only Route 27 annual boardings = 48,118 (0.81x baseline 59,590, +-11,471). Within plausibility envelope (warn at 120,000, cap at 150,000).
Amber warning if calibrated optimised LG annual exceeds this.
Red error: model output above this is implausible for LG.
Model-predicted boardings for current (existing) stop set.
OMB Circular A-4 §E.3 threshold: ±25%.  Model credible: True.  Calibration factor applied: 0.978.
Existing stops (daily boardings × 260) + new stops (est_annual_boardings from BCR model).
Calibration factor applied to correct for model bias.  This is the headline number for the meeting.  Calibration factor: 0.978.  If calibration error > 25%, use with caution — see caveat banner.
CAUTION means the model overestimates or underestimates observed ridership by >25%.  Dashboard should display a caveat banner and show both raw and calibrated numbers.
Net gain in annual boardings from stop optimisation (calibrated).

source: VTA Title VI Service Standards and Service Equity Analysis, FY2023, Table 3.2 (Route 27: 61,350 annual unlinked trips). URL: https://www.vta.org/reports-publications/title-vi-reports
